SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM ESPINOZA-VERDUGO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL LELANNE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA-VERDUGO, ABRAHAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LALANNE, MICHAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
